aquaServices.head: Aqua Services
aquaServices.title: Service providers that keep the chain moving

login.subtitle: Sign in with your mobile number

home.subtitle: AI-powered disease detection, live market prices, a verified marketplace, and logistics support — backed by expert guidance and official outbreak alerts.
home.modulesSub: Eight modules connect every stakeholder in Indian aquaculture — from the farmer with a basic Android in West Godavari to the bank officer underwriting their loan in Mumbai.

modules.diagnosticsD: PCR-grade EHP / WSSV / AHPND detection in 30 seconds. On-device TFLite.
modules.pricingD: Live mandi + export FOB rates across 31+ species and 9 coastal states.
modules.marketplaceD: KYC-verified seed, feed, aeration, ice, diagnostic kit suppliers.
modules.logisticsD: Load matching, GPS tracking, cold-chain compliance, e-way bills.
modules.advisoryD: Crop calendar, alerts within 5 km, voice assistant in 6 languages.
modules.b2bD: Hatchery dispatch, dispute resolution, HMAC-signed QC certs + QR.
modules.surveillanceD: MPEDA / NSPAAD outbreak heatmap, compliance dashboard for officers.
modules.riskD: Farm-risk Band A-D API for bank underwriting + insurance claims.
modules.survivalD: Estimate pond survival from stocking, mortality and sampling counts.
modules.feedD: Plan daily feed and FCR by biomass, count and growth stage.
modules.toolsD: Survival rate, feed/FCR and stocking calculators for every pond.

footer.brandLine: AI disease detection, live prices, a verified marketplace and logistics — for India's shrimp & prawn farmers.
footer.copyright: Aqua Rudra — Innovative aquaculture solutions for sustainable farming practices.
footer.subscribeSub: Disease alerts, pricing trends, new articles — in your language. Unsubscribe anytime.

builtFor.head: Built for
builtFor.title: One platform for the whole chain.
builtFor.sub: From the pond to the port — every link in the aquaculture chain, in your language, on your phone.

roleDesc.farmer: Live pond pricing, crop calendar, disease alerts within 5 km, voice assistant in your language.
roleDesc.vle: On-device AI diagnostics, manage a farmer cluster, commissions for every QC certificate issued.
roleDesc.transporter: Load board, GPS tracking, cold-chain temperature logs, e-way bills auto-generated.
roleDesc.ice: Ice orders, harvest-day routing, capacity planning across pond clusters.
roleDesc.oxygen: Aerator, diffuser and emergency O₂ supply with same-day pond delivery.
roleDesc.trader: Bulk procurement, lot-level quality verification, export FOB linkage.
roleDesc.resources: Knowledge hub, government schemes, technical guides and expert advisories — at your fingertips.

mobileApp.head: On your phone
mobileApp.title: Carry the platform to the pond.
mobileApp.body: The Aqua Rudra Android app works fully offline on a ₹8,000 phone. Sync when you have signal. All 5 AI models on-device. 6 Indian languages. iOS coming soon.

finalCta.title: Get started in 5 minutes
finalCta.body: Create an account, pick your role, complete KYC, and you're in the dashboard. Free for farmers — paid tiers for hatcheries, banks, traders and government bodies.

weather.cycloneAlert: Cyclone alert active for {{district}}. Check IMD advisory.

aquaai_page.subtitle: Catch disease before it spreads. Score every batch. Price every harvest. A full aquaculture intelligence platform — in your pocket, in your language, even when the network drops.
aquaai_page.dashboardSub: Each role opens its own dashboard.
aquaai_page.perfSub: Validated against PCR-confirmed test sets and manual count ground truth.

aboutPage.heroSubtitle: AI-powered disease detection, live market prices, a verified marketplace, and logistics support — backed by expert guidance and official outbreak alerts.
aboutPage.missionPara1: Aqua Rudra is more than an app — it's a community. We work closely with farmers, technicians and partners to make aquaculture stronger, together.
aboutPage.missionPara2: Join us across India's coastal states, in 6 Indian languages, as we help make farming safer, fairer and more profitable.
aboutPage.impactSubtitle: Aqua Rudra changes how farmers work — clearer decisions, fewer losses, and support in your own language. Here's the difference it makes:
aboutPage.impact0: Farming that protects the water and the coast for the long term.
aboutPage.impact1: AI disease checks right at the pond — results in seconds, even offline.
aboutPage.impact2: Live market prices, so you sell at the right time for the best value.
aboutPage.impact3: Farmers come first — the app is built around what you actually need.
aboutPage.impact4: Help through the whole crop cycle, in your own language.
aboutPage.impact5: Learn as you go — simple guides, videos and expert answers.
aboutPage.solveSubtitle: The everyday problems farmers face — and how Aqua Rudra helps with each one.
aboutPage.challenge0ChallengeBody: Quality seed, feed and supplies are often hard to find and hard to trust.
aboutPage.challenge0SolutionBody: Aqua Rudra connects you to checked suppliers, so you get quality seed, feed and inputs you can rely on.
aboutPage.challenge1Challenge: Disease can wipe out a crop
aboutPage.challenge1ChallengeBody: Diseases like EHP, white spot and white gut can destroy a pond and your income.
aboutPage.challenge1SolutionBody: Snap a photo and Aqua Rudra flags the disease risk in seconds — so you can act before it spreads.
aboutPage.challenge2ChallengeBody: Poor practices pollute the water and damage the coast.
aboutPage.challenge2SolutionBody: Aqua Rudra helps you use water and inputs wisely and follow safe, recognised standards.
aboutPage.challenge3ChallengeBody: Many farmers do not have easy access to expert guidance.
aboutPage.challenge3SolutionBody: Get plain advice, technical support and simple learning — so you can farm with confidence.
aboutPage.barriersPara1: India speaks many languages, and every farmer deserves tools they can actually understand. So we removed the language barrier.
aboutPage.barriersPara2: Aqua Rudra works in 6 Indian languages, so farmers in every coastal state can use the knowledge, tools and support they need — in their own language.
aboutPage.ctaSubtitle: Join farmers and traders across coastal India. Free to try — sign up in a few minutes.

aquaToolsPage.heading: Calculators
aquaToolsPage.intro: Plan every pond — survival rate, daily feed & FCR, aeration, stocking and profit, all on-device.

collaboratePage.heroSubtitle: Whether you're a researcher, institution, or investor — we're looking for partners who share our vision.

foundersPage.heroSubtitle: The team behind Aqua Rudra — engineers and researchers on a mission to decode aquaculture for India's farmers, hatcheries and government bodies.
foundersPage.visionQuote: "We started Aqua Rudra because the biggest problems in Indian aquaculture won't be solved by incremental progress — they need a fundamentally different approach."
foundersPage.founderOneBio:
Architect of scalable AI platforms enabling secure, cloud-native deployment of advanced machine learning and generative AI systems.
Expert in building production-grade AI infrastructure that powers biomedical research, large-scale data processing, and intelligent automation.

homePage.kycSubtitle: Complete your KYC now to request help from our experts.
homePage.diseaseMapDescription: Shrimp and Fish culture are often prone to diseases on a frequent basis. Such issues need to be solved at the earliest. Disease Map keeps you updated on all the diseases and locations nearest to you.

knowledgeArticlePage.notFoundBody: We couldn't find the article you're looking for.

knowledgePage.heroParagraph: Field-tested guides, disease playbooks and farmer case studies — sourced from ICAR-CIBA, NSPAAD, MPEDA circulars and Aqua Rudra's own diagnostic dataset. Read in your language. Learn at your pace.
knowledgePage.subscribeBlurb: Weekly newsletter — disease alerts, pricing trends, new articles. In your language.

kycPage.heroDesc: We verify your identity once and re-use the result across the platform — for hatchery B2B contracts, bank underwriting, MPEDA license linking and Razorpay payouts.
kycPage.aadhaarHelp: We never display your full Aadhaar after entry. NSDL handles the e-KYC; we store only the last 4 digits.
kycPage.otpSent: OTP sent by NSDL to the mobile linked to your Aadhaar.
kycPage.pennyDropFail: Bank refused penny-drop. Try a different account.
kycPage.kycLinked: Your KYC is now linked to every transaction on AquaI.

privacyPage.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPage.intro1: Your privacy is of prime importance to us. We value your Personal Information that you share with us. We appreciate the trust you have reposed in us in doing so. Through this Privacy Notice we would like to inform you of the manner in which we collect and process your Personal Information including and not limited to professional information while using our websites, web applications, and/or mobile applications (“<1>Apps</1>”) for you to avail the services (“<3>Services</3>”) offered by our Company (hereinafter referred to as “<5>{{company}}</5>”, “we”, “us” or “our”).
privacyPage.intro2: The Services, so offered here, adhere to all the laws, rules, regulations and policies including Data Protection Laws of India (“<1>Applicable Laws</1>”) with regard to the collection, use, disclosure, retention, purging and protection of your Personal Information that our Company would have access to as a result of your use of our Services and consent thereto.
privacyPage.c1_1: {{companyLegal}} is the Data Controller of Personal Information collected and processed for providing the Services.
privacyPage.s2Title: 2. What the Company collects from you
privacyPage.c2_1_1: Any Personally Identifiable Information (‘Personal Information’ or ‘Personal Data’) that we collect from you, with your consent, that relates to you, which includes your name, gender, phone number, email address, communication address, date of birth, identity proof, banking details to be studied only by the concerned professionals, et cetera, in furtherance to the Services being offered by us.
privacyPage.c2_1_2: We may also collect recurring information of your geographic locations on a continuous basis in furtherance to the services being provided by us.
privacyPage.c2_2_1: We may automatically collect and store certain types of information, including but not limited to usernames, passwords, and other security and usage related information, such as log data, analytical code, time stamp, geo stamp, IP address, version and identification number of the Apps and device, browser type, browser language, the date and time of your request, your profile, websites visited by you, search terms used, your mobile carrier data, platform type, number of clicks, phone number, requested status of other Users and various status information with regard to the Services provided through the Apps and / or its website (“<1>Usage Information</1>”) whenever you visit or utilize the Services. Such Usage Information collected is not associated with any Personal Data and is only tagged to the unique identifier for a particular device.
privacyPage.c2_2_2: As a standard practise, we use “cookies” for collecting information, from your device through which you are accessing our Services, in order to allow you to enter the sessions without frequently having to enter your password. These cookies are temporary and are automatically deleted from your device at the end of every session. You are always at the discretion to decline the cookies.
privacyPage.c2_3_1: We may also collect such other anonymous information that is not associated with or linked to any Personal Information (“<1>Anonymous Data</1>”) and which, by itself, does not permit the identification of any individual User. Anonymous Data includes without limitation, unique identifiers of the device on which website and / or the Apps are installed or accessed, such as VPN, information of Wi-Fi connectivity and such other information. We may also store this unique identifier, at many times and create a profile for you based on such Anonymous Data.
privacyPage.s3Title: 3. Purpose for which the information, so collected, is being used
privacyPage.c3_1: We may use the Personal Information and the information so associated with it for the following purposes:
privacyPage.c3_1_2: For the purposes of software verification or administering software upgrades;
privacyPage.c3_1_3: To maintain the quality of the Services and provide general statistics regarding their use;
privacyPage.c3_1_4: To deliver Services, including email notifications, confirmations, technical notices, updates, security alerts, support and administrative messages that you may request;
privacyPage.c3_1_6: To alert you about updated information and other such new or updated services that may be offered by other Users;
privacyPage.c3_1_7: To allow access to exclusive features or functionality of the Apps and / or its website;
privacyPage.c3_1_8: To launch and/or open other mobile applications installed on your device based on functionality of the Apps and / or its website; and
privacyPage.c3_1_9: To resolve disputes, collect due payments and troubleshoot problems.
privacyPage.c4_1: We may share the Personal Information, so received from you, in the following manner:
privacyPage.c4_1_1: With Company’s affiliates and Service Providers, as required, to provide the Services;
privacyPage.c4_1_2: With the Company’s affiliates in connection with matters relating to the consumption of Services by you to help detect and prevent identity theft, fraud and other potentially illegal acts; correlated or multiple accounts to prevent abuse of Services; and to facilitate joint or co-branded services that you request, where such services are provided by more than one corporate entity other than the Company; and
privacyPage.c4_1_3: If required to do so by law or regulation; to its legal counsel, law enforcement officers, governmental authorities who have asserted their lawful authority to obtain the information or where the Company has in good faith reasonable grounds to believe that such disclosure is reasonably necessary to enforce its Terms of Use or this Privacy Notice.
privacyPage.c4_2: The Company will not rent, sell, or otherwise provide Personal Data received from you to third parties without your consent, except as described herein or as required by law. However, the Company and its affiliates reserve the right to share, sell and transfer some or all of the Personal Data to other business entities should the Company, or its assets, plan to merge with, or be acquired by that business entity.
privacyPage.c5_1: The Company has implemented commercially reasonable physical, managerial, operational and technical security measures to protect the loss, misuse, alteration and security of the Personal Information received from you in the Company’s care. The Company’s security practices and procedures limit access to Personal Data only on ‘need to know’ basis. Such measures may include, where appropriate, the use of firewalls, secure server facilities, implementing proper access rights management systems and processes, careful selection of processors, standard authentication and encryption policies for its servers and other technically and commercially reasonable measures.
privacyPage.c5_2: The Company is committed to protecting the security of any Personal Data and uses reasonable efforts including a variety of security technologies and procedures to help protect such Personal Data from any unauthorized access, use or disclosure. However, the Company can only guarantee such protection of your Personal Information within its reasonable control. In situations involving any breach, the Company will try to rectify the problems as soon as possible.
privacyPage.c5_3: Any Personal Information, so destroyed, shall be disposed of in a manner that protects the privacy of the Personal Information received by us from you in an appropriate manner as per the industry standard practices and norms.
privacyPage.c5_4: You hereby acknowledge and understand that all Personal Data provided by you is with your express consent and understand the risk involved sharing your Personal Information.
privacyPage.c6_1: As a registered user of the Services, you have certain obligations to other users. Some of these obligations are imposed by Applicable Laws and regulations:
privacyPage.c6_2: You must, at all times, abide by the terms and conditions of the Privacy Notice and Terms of Use.
privacyPage.c6_3: You must respect all intellectual property rights that may belong to third parties.
privacyPage.c6_4: You must not upload or insert any comments that may be deemed to be injurious, violent, offensive, sexist, casteist, racist or xenophobic, or which may otherwise violate the purpose and spirit of our Company and its community of users;
privacyPage.c6_5: You must keep your username and passwords confidential and not share it with others; and
privacyPage.c6_6: All information given must be genuine and true. The Company shall not be held responsible in case of any wrong or fraudulent information given at the time of registration or at any subsequent time for using our Services.
privacyPage.c6_7: Any violation of this Privacy Notice by you may lead to the restriction, suspension or termination of your account with us, at the sole discretion of the Company.
privacyPage.c7_1: The usage of the Services is exclusively governed by the Laws applicable in India and the jurisdiction of the competent courts at Kakinada, State of Andhra Pradesh.
privacyPage.c7_2: The Company expressly disclaims any implied warranties or liabilities imputed by the laws of any other jurisdiction.
privacyPage.c8_1: Any modification to this Privacy Notice by the Company would be in accordance with the Applicable Laws and posted on the Website to reflect such modification so that you are always aware of what information Company collects and how it processes your Personal Information.
privacyPage.c8_2: You are requested to periodically visit this page for the latest information on Company’s privacy practices. Once posted, those changes are effective immediately. Continued access or use of the Apps and / or its website constitutes your acceptance of the changes and the amended Policy.
privacyPage.c9_1: In the event of query or clarification regarding this Privacy Notice you may write to the email address:
privacyPage.c9_2: In the event, you have grievances with respect to your Personal Information, you may write to the email address:

verifyPage.heroDescription: AquaI QC certificates are HMAC-signed. This page recomputes the signature against the canonical record and reports whether the document you have matches.
verifyPage.reasonNotFound: Certificate ID not found in registry.
verifyPage.invalidHelp: If you believe this certificate is genuine, the PDF may have been edited after signing or the ID may have been mistyped. Contact the issuing hatchery.
verifyPage.hmacDetail: HMAC-SHA256 over certId + batchId + QS + disease status + timestamp

scanScreen.title: Scan & Screen your shrimp
scanScreen.subtitle: Point your camera at the shrimp or pond sample. In seconds you get a plain-language screening of visible signs — and what to do next. Screening only, never a diagnosis.
scanScreen.idleHint: Take a clear, close photo of the shrimp or pond sample. We check visible signs and guide your next step — no lab needed to start.
scanScreen.screeningNote: Screening for visible signs — not a diagnosis
scanScreen.retake: The photo was unclear. A sharp, well-lit close-up gives a confident screening.
scanScreen.disclaimer: This is a screening of visible signs only — not a medical diagnosis. It cannot confirm diseases like EHP or WSSV, which need a PCR/RPA lab. Always confirm with a lab and an expert before acting.

summary.green: No clear visible signs were screened. Keep monitoring your pond as usual.
summary.amber: Some visible signs need a closer look. Improve conditions and recheck soon.
summary.red: Strong visible signs were screened. Act on pond conditions and confirm with a lab quickly.
summary.inconclusive: The screening was not clear enough to call. Please retake or confirm with a lab.

green: Re-scan if behaviour or feeding changes.
amber: Check feeding and reduce if needed.
red: Act now on water quality and aeration.
Consider a harvest decision with an expert.
Confirm urgently with a PCR/RPA lab.
inconclusive: Confirm with a lab if you are unsure.
